text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital is turning over a new<n>leaf. She
swears to relish in her love<n>for Umamusume only
during her free<n>time and dedicates herself to
running,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! I really jumped the gun,<n>don't you
think?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As the excitement over the Japan Dirt<n>Derby dies
down, so does her<n>resolve.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm supposed to rise to the samelevel as other Umamusume? Me?!Is that even possible?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Anything is fair game when it comes<n>to fantasy,
but I think this summer<n>heat has started to fry my
brain a bit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What I'm trying to say is... I'm not<n>sure I'm
capable of doing this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All I've done up until now is bask in<n>the divine
glow of Umamusume. Now<n>I'm supposed to
believe I can stand<n>beside them?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even if I try to overhaul myself, I'm<n>unsure how
much I can change after<n>spending all that time in
the past<n>daydreaming.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm not saying the game is rigged.<n>And I haven't
given up either... It's<n>just...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In times like these, when it seems<n>there's no way
forward, all there is to<n>do is bang my head against
my<n>manuscript... Okay, I'm gonna<n>continue this in
my dorm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y'know... for my new zine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: King-centric fanzine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Basically, it's gonna be a manga<n>about King Halo.
I've been thinking of<n>transforming her sublime
daily life into<n>sixteen-page fan comic.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It takes a bit to squeeze the info out<n>of her, but it's
sounding like she's<n>creating a sort of fan comic.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A fan project, huh? I would<n>appreciate it if you
asked for<n>permission first, though, honestly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, you're absolutely right. It's<n>just that... it's
pretty taboo to make<n>the actual person aware of
this sort<n>of... thing...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait a second! King?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The heroine herself stands before us.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A-a-all that talk about a fan comic<n>just now, I was
just joking!<n>Something like that can't possibly be
real... Call it a wild delusion on my<n>part!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, what could I have<n>done to afford
this visitation?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I just figured I'd come by to say hi.<n>By the way,
Digital...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're planning to run in this year's<n>Mile
Championship, yes?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! I was so moved watching you<n>run in it last
year, I wanted to follow in<n>your footsteps...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's nice to hear. However, if<n>you're
planning to run...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Then that makes us rivals, since I'm<n>running this
year as well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
REEEALLY?! You're gracing us with<n>your
presence yet again?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes. Although... I'm not sure how well<n>I'll do.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital quickly turns gloomy. I<n>wonder
what's come over her.
choice_data_list: Why the long face all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's just... It's like King doesn't<n>have the
same kind of energy she did<n>last year...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She got a solid third in the Yasuda<n>Kinen! But in the
G2 race before that,<n>she only took eleventh. You
can say<n>that's a sign she's recovering her
standing, but that makes this summer<n>a critical
time for her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you remember even my<n>placing? You're
certainly<n>well-informed. It reminds me of the
younger students who always cheer<n>me on...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's because you're one of<n>my absolute
faves.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Um, sorry if this isn't my place to say,<n>but... I'm
cheering for you, King.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even if we're rivals on the track... my<n>love for you
as a fan will still be as<n>strong as ever.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Well, I appreciate it. I'll<n>make sure I
put on a performance<n>that does my name justice.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After saying that, King Halo walks off,<n>still looking
glum.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... It looks like we need to<n>make a change
of plans!
choice_data_list:
You mean you want to reconsider the Mile
Championship?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Not that. What I mean is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I've got to change my manuscript!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My original idea was a manga, but<n>when it comes
to supporting King, my<n>personal preferences
should sit on<n>the sidelines.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want to make something that will<n>give King a
huge dose of energy, as a<n>fellow runner.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So the question is... what's the right<n>kind of book
to bring her back to life?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Do you have any ideas, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
What kind of book would improve her
performance?
choice_data_list: A book filled with empowering fan chants.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A book of chants! I see! If a gem like<n>that can
restore her spirit...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Then I could share it with her fans so<n>everyone
can learn them! Would you<n>lend me a hand?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital spends her<n>spare time
working on King Halo's<n>gift. Afterwards...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What in the world is going on, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. It's all fine. Just stand<n>here, please.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, King fans! Did everyone read<n>your
books? Then, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What's her name?!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is she the strongest?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: She's the champion!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: How's the future looking?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
It's so bright! She's the Umamusume<n>everyone
wants to be!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Now, give it up for King!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: King! King! King King King!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: King! King! King King King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh... You did all this just for me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there's a lot more going on<n>than my usual
chants.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
King Halo seems happy, as if just<n>hearing the
chant has given her<n>energy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
An illustration collection! Yeah... And if<n>it's
something small, I could even<n>give it to her directly
without breaking<n>any rules.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Which means we have to go pay our<n>respects to
all the best illustrators at<n>summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If you would be so kind, I'd like to<n>request just
one illustration of King<n>looking composed!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ummm, if you're really okay with my<n>drawing... Is
a picture book style all<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wh-what are you asking me for?!I'm not saying I can't do it... but...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital goes around<n>commissioning
each and every artist<n>she knows, until...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: This book is... a present for me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's just a small tribute. I was hoping<n>it could help
cheer you up.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is a very thoughtful<n>summer gift. Thank
you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh... This one's... extremely detailed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that one! That one was born out<n>of an excess
of devotion that kept the<n>artist up for three nights
straight!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital put more effort into her<n>drawing than
anyone else. Between<n>all her work illustrating and
commissioning others, she seems to<n>have
cultivated a wealth of<n>perseverance.
